name: High Cable Bicep Curl (Seated)
description: Sit at a lat pulldown station with two individual handles attached to the high pulley. Grip one handle in each hand with palms facing up. Start with arms extended overhead, then curl the handles down toward your shoulders, keeping upper arms relatively stable. Squeeze biceps at the bottom, then control back up. The overhead angle emphasizes the short head of the bicep and provides constant cable tension throughout the range.
